ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's captain */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the tournament is for (e.g., Football, Basketball) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the tournament's logo */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., Round Robin, Knockout) */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., International, Domestic) */,
  "tournament_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tournament */,
  "tournament_url" TEXT /* URL to the tournament's official website */,
  "language_support" TEXT /* List of languages supported for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match is part of */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match is played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Upcoming, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "match_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the match (e.g., Group Stage, Quarter Finals, Finals) */,
  "match_highlights_url" TEXT /* URL to the match highlights */,
  "match_tv_channels" TEXT /* List of TV channels broadcasting the match */,
  "match_weather_conditions_detail" TEXT /* Detailed weather conditions during the match (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result is for */,
  "team1_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the first team */,
  "team2_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the second team */,
  "team1_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the first team */,
  "team2_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the second team */,
  "team1_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks taken by the first team */,
  "team2_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks taken by the second team */,
  "team1_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the first team */,
  "team2_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the second team */,
  "match_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the match report */,
  "team1_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the first team */,
  "team2_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the second team */,
  "team1_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the first team */,
  "team2_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the second team */,
  "team1_possession" REAL /* Possession percentage for the first team */,
  "team2_possession" REAL /* Possession percentage for the second team */,
  "team1_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside occurrences for the first team */,
  "team2_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside occurrences for the second team */,
  "team1_saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the first team's goalkeeper */,
  "team2_saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the second team's goalkeeper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the standing is for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "player_national_team" TEXT /* National team the player represents */,
  "player_career_history" TEXT /* Brief career history of the player */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Social media links for the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., Active, Injured, Retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and permissions */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store the specific permissions for each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile photo */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "user_social_media" TEXT /* Social media links for the user */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., team data, match results) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
